name: Tidehunter
description: You can't hide from the tide.

abilities.name: Gush
abilities.description: Damages the unit-targeted enemy, and reduces its movement speed and armor. Gush becomes a ground-targeted wave ability that affects enemy units in a line. Reduces cooldown. Cast Range: 700 (2200). Damage: 100/160/220/280 (200/260/320/380). Armor Reduction: 3/4/5/6 (7/8/9/10). Move Speed Slow: 40% (60%). Duration: 4.5. Wave Travel Distance: (2200). Mana Cost: 12.

abilities.name: Kraken Shell
abilities.description: Passively damage block a portion of any incoming physical attack damage. Temporarily hardens Tidehunter's hide further, reducing even more physical attack damage with a trade-off. Proc Chance: 100%. Blocked Damage: 15/35/55/75. Blocked Damage Factor: 2. Self Move Speed Slow: 40%. Duration: 4. Creep Blocked Damage Factor: 0.5. Mana Cost: 30.

abilities.name: Anchor Smash
abilities.description: Instantly attacks and reduces all enemy units' main attack damage within the radius. Radius: 375. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Instant Attack Damage Bonus: 50/100/150/200. Attack Damage Reduction: 25%/30%/35%/40% (35%/40%/45%/50%). Duration: 6. Cooldown: 7/6/5/4. Mana Cost: 40/45/50/55.

abilities.name: Dead in the Water
abilities.description: Attaches and leashes a heavy anchor to an enemy hero. Attempting to move a certain distance from the anchor sets its movement speed value and forces the affected unit to drag the Anchor behind them. Cast Range: 350. Chain Length: 350. Set Max Move Speed: 100. Hit Count: 4. Debuff Duration: 10. Hit Count: 40. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.description: Damages and stuns all enemy units within the radius. Max Effect Radius: 1250. Effect Width: 250. Damage: 275/375/475. Stun Duration: 2/2.2/2.4 (3/3.2/3.4). Cooldown: 150/145/140. Mana Cost: 125/225/325.
